exploratory.purpose: Learn tooling friction; no go/no-go on core vs baseline
exploratory.min_paired_runs_note: At least 1 documented exploratory pair (any fixture) before confirmation scheduling

confirmation.description: Preregistered before any confirmation analysis. Do not change after first confirmation pair starts.

sample_size.rationale: Small fixed N for solo/small-team cost; enough for directional signal, not publication-grade power.

primary_endpoint.definition: Share of pairs where core assertions_pass and judge_pass, minus same for baseline
primary_endpoint.interpretation: Confirmation green only if core − baseline ≥ 0 on primary (core not worse).

secondary_endpoints.interpretation: Core must not cost more than 25% above baseline median.

long_horizon.interpretation: At least one Long-Horizon completion on bug-fix with checklist ticked.

held_out.description: Separate sample after confirmation green; same thresholds; new paired runs only.
